name: Pink and Mint Embellished Lehenga
description: Heavily embellished pink blouse with a pastel lehenga. Glamorous yet elegant.
stylistNotes: Goes well with pearl jewelry and soft curls.

name: Dusty Pastel Dream Lehenga
description: Soft dusty pink and blue lehenga with light embroidery and organza dupatta.
stylistNotes: Wear minimal jewelry and focus on fresh dewy makeup.

name: Lilac Zari Bridal Lehenga
description: Lavender-toned lehenga with heavy zari embroidery. Ideal for intimate weddings.
stylistNotes: Complete the look with emerald jewelry and a soft glam look.

name: Rainbow Pastel Bridal Lehenga
description: A unique blend of pastel hues and golden embroidery for a modern bride.
stylistNotes: Opt for soft curls, light pink lips and Kundan set.
materialCare: Dry clean with light iron only.

name: Yellow & Silver Crystal Lehenga
description: Bright yellow lehenga with silver embroidery and mesh sleeves blouse.
stylistNotes: Suitable for daytime wedding functions with diamond or green stone jewelry.
materialCare: Store in garment bag. Dry clean only.
